login_description: Sign in to access the admin dashboard
profile_description: Manage your personal information and account details
full_name_help: Your full name as it appears in the system
email_address_help: Your email address for login and notifications
profile_updated_description: Your profile information has been saved successfully.
avatar_updated_description: Your avatar has been uploaded successfully.
avatar_deleted_description: Your avatar has been removed successfully.
account_settings_description: Manage your account security and preferences
change_password_description: Update your password to keep your account secure
password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
password_min_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long
password_updated_description: Your password has been changed successfully.
security_tip_1: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
security_tip_2: Never share your password with anyone, including support staff.
security_tip_3: Change your password regularly and avoid reusing old passwords.
security_tip_4: Use a unique password for this account - do not use the same password across multiple sites.
language_description: Choose the language for the dashboard interface.
